summary.description:
A galvanised light-steel kit priced per square metre. Ships flat-packed
with structural framing, prefabricated walls, roofing, kitchen, bathroom,
and finishes. Fast on-site assembly with no specialised equipment —
a builder-friendly alternative to traditional stick framing.

construction.main_structure: Q350/Q550 galvanised steel columns, beams, purlins (275 g/m² hot-dip galvanised)
construction.wall_panels: Soundproof / insulated composite panels with PVC or metal cladding
construction.roof_system: Purlins + waterproof layer (asphalt shingles or metal sheet)
construction.glazing: Aluminium-framed windows (1200 × 900 mm); steel entry door
construction.interior_finish: Latex paint + primer; aluminium ceiling in kitchen/bathroom

appliances_included: L-shaped kitchen cabinet (eco particleboard + quartz countertop)
5.0 kW gas/electric hybrid range with hood

pricing.display: ≈ USD 17 / m² for main steel frame; full kit pricing available on quote
pricing.notes: Per-line-item pricing; excludes land, labor, taxes, transportation

source.notes:
Seeded from Easy Home (Qingdao) 50 m² quotation. See
`supplier-folders.txt` in this same folder for sourcing options.

Sister sizes (60, 74, 150, 176 m²) are in `Modulaires/Easy home/`
and become Kit-60, Kit-75, Kit-100, Kit-150 in the Nanopods catalogue.
